phaseTitle: ChatGPT Artifact Download Bridge V2 Integration v1
purpose: Install the proven V2 strict ChatGPT artifact download selector into the browser bridge so future JSON-to-ZIP autopilot runs do not require manual ZIP downloads.
capabilities: rejects giant message containers and selects real anchor/button/download controls
requires exact expected artifact filename context before clicking
prevents false proof pass after failed download
adds standalone artifact download helper for standardized troubleshooting
adds verifier and QA scripts for Phase193
